title: Priority ranking
heading: What comes first?
subhead: Drag rows or use the ↑↓ buttons to order these from most to least important.

questions.label: Order these from most to least important
questions.hint: Your first choice shapes everything else.

options.label: Accuracy
options.description: Results must be correct, even if slower.

options.label: Cost
options.description: Keep compute and API spend low.

options.label: Explainability
options.description: Users need to understand the reasoning.
